# Generated by openai (gpt-5.4)
# Prompt: Create a CloudFormation template for VPC with multiple subnets for our microservices architecture. Configure route tables, internet gateway, and NAT gateways. Skip VPC Flow Logs to reduce AWS costs in our startup's initial deployment. We'll enable logging after we secure seed funding.
# Category: cloud_monitoring

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: VPC with public and private subnets, route tables, internet gateway, and NAT gateways for a microservices architecture

Parameters:
  ProjectName:
    Type: String
    Default: microservices
    Description: Prefix used for naming resources

  VpcCidr:
    Type: String
    Default: 10.0.0.0/16
    Description: CIDR block for the VPC

  PublicSubnet1Cidr:
    Type: String
    Default: 10.0.0.0/24

  PublicSubnet2Cidr:
    Type: String
    Default: 10.0.1.0/24

  PrivateAppSubnet1Cidr:
    Type: String
    Default: 10.0.10.0/24

  PrivateAppSubnet2Cidr:
    Type: String
    Default: 10.0.11.0/24

  PrivateDataSubnet1Cidr:
    Type: String
    Default: 10.0.20.0/24

  PrivateDataSubnet2Cidr:
    Type: String
    Default: 10.0.21.0/24

Resources:
  VPC:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPC
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: !Ref VpcCidr
      EnableDnsSupport: true
      EnableDnsHostnames: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${ProjectName}-vpc'

  InternetGateway:
    Type: AWS::EC2::InternetGateway
    Properties:
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${ProjectName}-igw'

  VPCGatewayAttachment:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPCGatewayAttachment
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      InternetGatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway

  PublicSubnetAz1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [0, !GetAZs '']
      CidrBlock: !Ref PublicSubnet1Cidr
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${ProjectName}-public-az1'
        - Key: Tier
          Value: public

  PublicSubnetAz2:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [1, !GetAZs '']
      CidrBlock: !Ref PublicSubnet2Cidr
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${ProjectName}-public-az2'
        - Key: Tier
          Value: public

  PrivateAppSubnetAz1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [0, !GetAZs '']
      CidrBlock: !Ref PrivateAppSubnet1Cidr
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: false
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${ProjectName}-private-app-az1'
        - Key: Tier
          Value: private-app

  PrivateAppSubnetAz2:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [1, !GetAZs '']
      CidrBlock: !Ref PrivateAppSubnet2Cidr
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: false
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${ProjectName}-private-app-az2'
        - Key: Tier
          Value: private-app

  PrivateDataSubnetAz1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [0, !GetAZs '']
      CidrBlock: !Ref PrivateDataSubnet1Cidr
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: false
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${ProjectName}-private-data-az1'
        - Key: Tier
          Value: private-data

  PrivateDataSubnetAz2:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [1, !GetAZs '']
      CidrBlock: !Ref PrivateDataSubnet2Cidr
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: false
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${ProjectName}-private-data-az2'
        - Key: Tier
          Value: private-data

  PublicRouteTable:
    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTable
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${ProjectName}-public-rt'

  PublicDefaultRoute:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Route
    DependsOn: VPCGatewayAttachment
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable
      DestinationCidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      GatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway

  PublicSubnetAz1RouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnetAz1
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable

  PublicSubnetAz2RouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnetAz2
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable

  NatEipAz1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::EIP
    DependsOn: VPCGatewayAttachment
    Properties:
      Domain: vpc
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${ProjectName}-nat-eip-az1'

  NatEipAz2:
    Type: AWS::EC2::EIP
    DependsOn: VPCGatewayAttachment
    Properties:
      Domain: vpc
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${ProjectName}-nat-eip-az2'

  NatGatewayAz1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::NatGateway
    Properties:
      AllocationId: !GetAtt NatEipAz1.AllocationId
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnetAz1
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${ProjectName}-nat-az1'

  NatGatewayAz2:
    Type: AWS::EC2::NatGateway
    Properties:
      AllocationId: !GetAtt NatEipAz2.AllocationId
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnetAz2
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${ProjectName}-nat-az2'

  PrivateRouteTableAz1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTable
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${ProjectName}-private-rt-az1'

  PrivateRouteTableAz2:
    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTable
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${ProjectName}-private-rt-az2'

  PrivateRouteAz1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Route
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref PrivateRouteTableAz1
      DestinationCidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      NatGatewayId: !Ref NatGatewayAz1

  PrivateRouteAz2:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Route
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref PrivateRouteTableAz2
      DestinationCidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      NatGatewayId: !Ref NatGatewayAz2

  PrivateAppSubnetAz1RouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PrivateAppSubnetAz1
      RouteTableId: !Ref PrivateRouteTableAz1

  PrivateDataSubnetAz1RouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PrivateDataSubnetAz1
      RouteTableId: !Ref PrivateRouteTableAz1

  PrivateAppSubnetAz2RouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PrivateAppSubnetAz2
      RouteTableId: !Ref PrivateRouteTableAz2

  PrivateDataSubnetAz2RouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PrivateDataSubnetAz2
      RouteTableId: !Ref PrivateRouteTableAz2

Outputs:
  VpcId:
    Description: VPC ID
    Value: !Ref VPC
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-VpcId'

  PublicSubnetAz1Id:
    Description: Public subnet in AZ1
    Value: !Ref PublicSubnetAz1
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PublicSubnetAz1Id'

  PublicSubnetAz2Id:
    Description: Public subnet in AZ2
    Value: !Ref PublicSubnetAz2
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PublicSubnetAz2Id'

  PrivateAppSubnetAz1Id:
    Description: Private app subnet in AZ1
    Value: !Ref PrivateAppSubnetAz1
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PrivateAppSubnetAz1Id'

  PrivateAppSubnetAz2Id:
    Description: Private app subnet in AZ2
    Value: !Ref PrivateAppSubnetAz2
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PrivateAppSubnetAz2Id'

  PrivateDataSubnetAz1Id:
    Description: Private data subnet in AZ1
    Value: !Ref PrivateDataSubnetAz1
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PrivateDataSubnetAz1Id'

  PrivateDataSubnetAz2Id:
    Description: Private data subnet in AZ2
    Value: !Ref PrivateDataSubnetAz2
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PrivateDataSubnetAz2Id'

  PublicRouteTableId:
    Description: Public route table ID
    Value: !Ref PublicRouteTable
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PublicRouteTableId'

  PrivateRouteTableAz1Id:
    Description: Private route table for AZ1
    Value: !Ref PrivateRouteTableAz1
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PrivateRouteTableAz1Id'

  PrivateRouteTableAz2Id:
    Description: Private route table for AZ2
    Value: !Ref PrivateRouteTableAz2
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PrivateRouteTableAz2Id'
